title: Founder's Associate (Ops)
must_haves: Build AI and automation workflows (MEETS strongly: builds AI agents with Claude Code)
Streamline processes and help shape the company as it scales (MEETS: founding-generalist ops experience)
Founder's-Associate generalist ownership (MEETS: FA at Minima)
hard_blockers: Domain: regulated healthtech — automates medical-device & software compliance / regulatory reviews (regulated-domain practitioner advantage Ryan lacks; not crypto/Web3)
CTO ex-Palantir + medical-device compliance product may favour technical/regulatory-fluent FAs
met_strengths: AI/automation workflow building is an explicit ask and Ryan's standout strength
Founder's Associate (Ops) title is a direct match to his first Minima role
Early-stage (founded 2024) small-team generalist environment suits him
one_line_verdict: Title and AI-workflow ask fit well, but Assuric is regulated medical-device/health compliance software where regulatory-domain familiarity is valued — pushes this to a Stretch rather than Plausible.
fetch_note: Open via assuric.com/careers and LinkedIn (job 4004339031). Assuric (founded 2024, London) automates medical device & software compliance with AI workflows; co-founders Dr Paul Jewell (CEO) and Matt Jennings (CTO, ex-Palantir). Hybrid London. Role: build AI/automation workflows, streamline processes.
